headlines.title: Trump says King will be 'very safe' during US visit after security talks
headlines.description: The state visit will go ahead despite concerns raised after a gunman targeted an event attended by the president.

headlines.title: UK's biggest ever environmental pollution claim reaches High Court
headlines.description: One of the UK's largest chicken producers and a water company accused of polluting three rivers including the River Wye

headlines.title: UK healthy life expectancy falls by two years in past decade
headlines.description: Poor housing, obesity and the effects of deprivation have been suggested as underlying cause.

headlines.title: Arson arrest after fire at packed-out LGBT+ club
headlines.description: An eyewitness says "thousands" of people were evacuated from the club.

headlines.title: Michael Jackson biopic smashes box office record
headlines.description: The film received poor reviews but has stormed the box office, taking $217m (£160m) globally.

headlines.title: 'I don't want the children to see how worried we are': UK family finances hit by Iran war
headlines.description: British families tell BBC Panorama how the Iran war is affecting their monthly budgets.

headlines.title: Ukraine's drone commander has Russian oil, troops and morale in his sights
headlines.description: In a rare interview, Commander Robert Brovdi shared how his unit accounts for a third of all targets destroyed on the battlefield.

headlines.title: Car bomb hijacking victim 'incredibly brave', says police chief
headlines.description: Chief Constable Jon Boutcher says his officers suspect the bombing was carried out by the dissident republican group known as the New IRA.

headlines.title: Kenya's Sabastian Sawe makes history with sub-two hour marathon time in London
headlines.description: Sabastian Sawe makes history at the London Marathon as the first person to run a sub-two-hour marathon in a competitive race.

headlines.title: Man arrested over attacks on Jewish community in London
headlines.description: A 37-year-old man is arrested on suspicion of preparing terrorist acts.

headlines.title: Shooting raises questions about Trump security
headlines.description: The shooting at the White House correspondents' dinner is the third time in three years Trump has been at the centre of a major security incident.

headlines.title: What we know about the incident
headlines.description: Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump were rushed from a ballroom after gunfire was heard.

headlines.title: Suspected gunman identified as 31-year-old Californian
headlines.description: The man arrested at the event attended by President Trump has been named in US media as Cole Tomas Allen from California.

headlines.title: Watch: How gunfire sparked chaos at Trump press dinner
headlines.description: President Trump and Vice-President Vance were rushed off the stage, after gunshots were heard at the event at the Washington Hilton hotel.

headlines.title: Less bread, more office time - the boss of Pret on our changing eating habits
headlines.description: Customers want great value but that doesn't necessarily mean the cheapest products, says Pano Christou.

headlines.title: First-time buyers, priced out of Wales' fastest-growing city, say they're 'losing faith'
headlines.description: Its population is booming from incomers from Cardiff and Bristol, stretching its housing market thin.

headlines.title: 'It lit a fire in me' - the barrister who was told she'd never amount to much
headlines.description: Leonie Hughes was expelled from school aged 15. Now, she's joined the Bar - and become a viral star.

headlines.title: The Chinese sports brand taking on Nike and Adidas
headlines.description: Now one of the biggest sportswear firms, Anta's rise follows a playbook adopted by many Chinese giants.

headlines.title: With presidents, cowboys and A-listers - King Charles pictured in US over the years
headlines.description: The British monarch returns to the US on Monday, a country he has been visiting for decades.

headlines.title: Did Trump save eight Iranian women from execution?
headlines.description: The US president says he saved eight Iranian women from execution, but Iran says otherwise.

headlines.title: How climate change threatens the economic backbone of the Pacific
headlines.description: Tuna populations around the Pacific Islands could move away as ocean temperatures increase.

headlines.title: Missing 5-year-old girl likely abducted from Outback home, police say
headlines.description: Police are searching for a man recently released from prison over her disappearance.

headlines.title: Murdered teen's mum dismayed as PM meets tech bosses first
headlines.description: Esther Ghey says it is "equally important" the PM hears from bereaved families as well as tech giants.

headlines.title: 'Four days of hell in hospital' - England midfielder Missy Bo Kearns on miscarriage
headlines.description: Aston Villa and England midfielder Missy Bo Kearns says she spent "four days of hell in hospital" after suffering a miscarriage and contracting sepsis.

headlines.title: Mali defence minister killed as country hit by wave of rebel attacks
headlines.description: A wave of coordinated attacks by jihadist militants and separatists has spread through the country.

headlines.title: Southport dads finish London Marathon side by side
headlines.description: Sergio Aguiar and David Stancombe complete the course in a time of four hours and 36 minutes.

headlines.title: French teen who licked vending machine straw faces jail in Singapore
headlines.description: The teen, who posted on social media a video of himself licking the straw, could be jailed for more than two years.

headlines.title: Pirates seize another vessel off Somali coast as threat level increased
headlines.description: The UK's maritime monitor reports at least four suspected piracy incidents in the past week off the coast of Somalia.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Will another week of Starmer drama impact the elections?
headlines.description: We look at if the latest problems for the PM are impacting the campaign trail

headlines.title: Who is Trump’s “would-be assassin”… were there security failings at DC shooting?
headlines.description: The US president was evacuated from the White House Correspondents Dinner

headlines.title: Puss in Boots, voiced by Antonio Banderas, is on an exciting quest
headlines.description: Puss teams up with a fellow thieving feline and Humpty Dumpty to go on an exciting quest.

headlines.title: Running 100 marathons in 100 days - fuelled by an Indian hedge 'obsession'
headlines.description: Hannah Cox had never run before but set herself a target of 100 marathons in 100 days across India as a 'love letter' to her late father. Here's how she did it.

headlines.title: Tottenham's Simons to miss rest of season and World Cup
headlines.description: Tottenham and Netherlands attacking midfielder Xavi Simons is "heartbroken" to have injured his anterior cruciate ligament.

headlines.title: O'Sullivan-Higgins match set for thrilling finish
headlines.description: The World Championship last-16 tie between Ronnie O'Sullivan and John Higgins is set for a dramatic end after the Scot closed the deficit to two frames.

headlines.title: Making history and facing Neymar - Lingard on life in Brazil
headlines.description: In his first major interview since moving to Brazil, Jesse Lingard talks to the BBC about his new life, and Manchester United.

headlines.title: Fitzpatricks' historic win earns younger brother Alex PGA Tour card
headlines.description: Alex and Matt Fitzpatrick make history by becoming the first brothers to win a PGA Tour event at the Zurich Classic of New Orleans pairs tournament.

headlines.title: The winners & losers from the 2026 NFL Draft
headlines.description: Did the Los Angeles Rams make a big mistake? Did the Las Vegas Raiders build enough around Fernando Mendoza? And could there finally be something to shout about for the two New York teams?
